DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER PATTERSON, GREGORY INIGUEZ, KARINA

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS GREGORY PATTERSON AND KARINA INIGUEZ' PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT VACATES ITS RULING OF JULY 2, 2012 GRANTING THE PETITION. BECAUSE OF THE RE-NOTICES FILED ON JUNE 4, 2012 AND JUNE 6, 2012, THE PETITION SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN HEARD ON THAT DATE. THE COURT NOW GRANTS THE PETITION. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; NOT REPORTED.

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terence O. Mayo, Esq. of Mayo & Mayo, Tel. 415.397.1515, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs GREGORY PATTERSON and KARINA INIGUEZ' Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration is granted. The Court vacates its ruling of July 2, 2012 granting the Petition. Because of the re-notices filed on June 4, 2012 and June 6, 2012, the Petition should not have been heard on that date. The Court now grants the Petition. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Not reported.
